productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Ultimatum Max Navy Blue Backpacks
description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this tough navy blue nike Ultimatum Max Air Utility backpack. Carry it to college, office or on a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you can think of, while you strut around looking super cool! Measurement Height: 51 cm Width: 41 cm Depth: 21 cm Capacity: 29.5 litres Made of 32% polyester and 68% nylon for enhanced durability and style Nylon lining for increased durability Two main zippered compartments to accomodate all your useful items One compartment with a separate laptop enclosure Second compartment with small pouches and a small zippered pocket for storing essentials Two zippered pouches on the front for stowing essentials nike Swoosh on the pouch at top Mesh pockets on sides to hold bottles Exterior media-player zip pocket at left top to keep your player secure and protected Adjustable shoulders straps with lightweight yet durable Nike Max Air technology to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenly Ventilated and molded back panel for breathability and comfort Haul loop for handling ease Branding on straps Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
